title: Evals Are Broken, Use Them Anyway — Ara Khan, Cline
summary: Ara Khan argues that AI benchmark evaluations are fundamentally broken as absolute measures of quality, but should still be used as diagnostic tools. He proposes a three-zone framework for analyzing failures: obvious bugs, nuanced improvements specific to model families, and benchmark overfitting.
